evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: 1% Better Every Day: ... You move quickly, deliver results
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD pairs explicit velocity language (move quickly, scaling faster than 99.98% of venture-backed startups) with equally strong rigour signals (Drive data quality, testing, monitoring, alerting), showing rough parity.
evidence.domain_risk: real-time operational decisions to strategic business insights to networks of autonomous AI agents
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is a logistics marketplace where data errors affect operational and business decisions without explicit financial-reporting or regulatory-compliance language, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Help define and evolve our analytics engineering processes and standards as we scale
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The company has an established ~110-person team with half in engineering/product/data and named tooling already in use, but the candidate is asked to define and evolve processes as they scale, indicating a mid-maturity function still forming standards.
evidence.jd_authorship: Demonstrated experience with dbt, with a track record of building and maintaining efficient, scalable, and reliable DAGs
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical specificity (DAGs, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, agentic workflows, Last Mile squad) shows someone who has done this job wrote it.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build the foundations for our key AI systems - Our Last Mile marketplace is becoming increasingly agentic, you will be a key owner of the inputs that power these systems
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is the data/AI infrastructure layer itself (foundational data models powering analytics, data science, and AI workflows) rather than a specific commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Shape our practices — Help define and evolve our analytics engineering processes and standards as we scale
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic ownership (shaping practices, owning AI system inputs) with execution work partnering with engineers and business leaders on scoped data models, reflecting genuine mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role: Build the foundations for our key AI systems - ... you will be a key owner of the inputs that power these systems
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to build and own the data infrastructure that powers autonomous AI agents, making them an enabler; the JD also separately notes familiarity with AI coding tools as a nice-to-have, but the dominant signal is enabling AI systems.
evidence.testing_framing: Drive data quality - Implement testing, monitoring, and alerting to ensure our data is accurate, timely, and trustworthy
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing, monitoring, and alerting are framed as an owned responsibility using an explicit ownership verb ("Drive"), making this a responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Drive data quality - Implement testing, monitoring, and alerting to ensure our data is accurate, timely, and trustworthy
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data quality and trustworthiness are a named responsibility pillar reflecting operational reliability concern, but the JD is dominated by growth, scaling, and delivery framing rather than a full risk/compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design core data models - Partner with engineers and business leaders within the Last Mile squad to design and build foundational data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Designing and building foundational data models for a rapidly scaling squad is explicitly greenfield build work.
evidence.work_arrangement: We work 4 days on-site, with 1 day remote.
evidence.loss_aversion: Drive data quality - Implement testing, monitoring, and alerting to ensure our data is accurate, timely, and trustworthy — reflects operational concern about data reliability rather than compliance.
